mapper.sql: id, student_id, resource_id,course_id,status, progress, duration, last_position, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM learning_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND resource_id = #{resourceId}
SELECT FROM learning_record ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM learning_record WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM learning_record WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND status = 1
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(progress), 0) FROM learning_record WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId}
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(duration), 0) FROM learning_record WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM learning_record WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_id) FROM learning_record WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND status = 1
SELECT IFNULL(AVG(progress), 0) FROM learning_record WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
